adult-spaghettios.name: Adult "spaghettios
instructions: Purée tomatoes in a food processor until mostly smooth; there should still be some dime-sized pieces remaining. Set aside.

Whisk panko, cheese, oregano, garlic powder, ¼ tsp. red pepper flakes, and 1½ tsp. salt in a medium bowl. Whisk in egg and cream. Add beef and mix with your hands until just combined, being careful not to overwork (if packed too firmly, meatballs will be dense). Form into 1"-diameter balls (you should have about 24); transfer to a plate.

Heat oil in a large skillet, preferably cast iron, over medium-high. Cook meatballs, turning occasionally, until lightly browned on all sides but not fully cooked through, about 5 minutes. Transfer to another plate.

Cook onion and garlic in same skillet, stirring occasionally, until onion is translucent and begins to soften, about 5 minutes; season with salt and pepper. Add tomato paste and cook until brick red, about 1 minute. Add paprika and a pinch of red pepper flakes and cook until fragrant, about 1 minute. Add sugar, basil, and reserved tomato purée. Reduce heat and simmer until sauce is slightly reduced and flavors have melded, about 20 minutes. Add meatballs and any accumulated juices; continue to cook until meatballs are cooked through, 5–10 minutes.

Meanwhile, cook pasta in a large pot of boiling salted water, stirring occasionally, until al dente. Drain and return to pasta pot. Pour sauce and meatballs over pasta and stir to combine. Transfer to a platter and top with cheese.

aged-rib-eye-with-onion-puree.name: Aged Rib Eye With Onion Purée

ingredients.item: Vidalia or maui onions (about 1 1/4 pound total)
ingredients.prep: very thinly sliced on a mandoline (about three packed cups)
standing at room temperature for 1 hour

ingredients.item: Assorted soft herb sprigs (such as tarragon

instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons butter in a 12" heavy skillet over medium-low heat. Add onions and cook, stirring constantly, until translucent (do not brown), 10–12 minutes. Add stock and 3/4 cup water. Bring to a simmer, reduce heat to low, cover, and continue to simmer until onions are falling apart, about 20 minutes. Uncover and stir until onions are almost dry (do not brown), about 5 minutes. Transfer onions to a blender. Add buttermilk and 1 tablespoon water. Purée until smooth. Season with kosher salt.

Preheat oven to 350°. Arrange a wire rack inside a rimmed baking sheet. Melt 2 tablespoons butter with oil in a large cast-iron skillet or large heavy skillet over medium-high heat. Season steak generously with kosher salt. Cook until a deep brown crust forms, 3–4 minutes per side and 1–2 minutes on edges. Place on prepared rack. Roast until a thermometer inserted into steak registers 115°, about 40 minutes. (Steak will carry over to medium-rare.) Let rest for 30 minutes.

Melt remaining 2 tablespoons butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat; cook until butter browns, about 2 minutes. Add steak and cook for 30 seconds per side, allowing steak to absorb butter. Cut steak into 4 slices. Place 1 steak slice on each plate and sprinkle with sea salt. Spoon warm onion purée alongside. Scatter herbs over purée.

air-fryer-chicken-kiev-balls.name: Air Fryer Chicken Kiev Balls
instructions: Mix butter, parsley, and garlic together in a bowl until well combined. Divide mixture into 12 equal parts on a baking sheet. Freeze until solid, about 20 minutes.

Shape ground chicken into 12 balls. Make a deep thumbprint in the center of each ball. Place a piece of frozen herbed butter in center, wrapping meat around it until fully covered. Repeat with remaining balls.
Beat eggs in a bowl. Combine panko, paprika, salt, and pepper in a separate bowl.

Dip 1 ground chicken ball in beaten eggs, then in seasoned bread crumbs. Dip ball back into egg and in seasoned bread crumbs once more. Repeat with remaining balls. Place on a baking sheet and freeze for 10 minutes.
Preheat an air fryer to 204°C (200 degrees C). Place half of the balls in the air fryer basket and spray with cooking spray.
Cook for 5 minutes. Flip balls over with tongs and spray again with cooking spray. Cook for 5 minutes more. Repeat with remaining chicken balls.

air-fryer-mustard-crusted-pork-tenderloi.name: Air Fryer Mustard-crusted Pork Tenderloin With Potatoes And Green Beans

ingredients.prep: such as The Little Potato® Company

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat an air fryer to 204°C (200 degrees C) according to manufacturer's instructions.
Whisk mustard, brown sugar, parsley, thyme, salt, and pepper together in a large bowl. Place tenderloin into the bowl and roll through the mustard mixture until evenly coated on all sides.
Place potatoes, green beans, and olive oil into a separate bowl. Season with salt and pepper to taste and stir until evenly combined. Set aside.

Place tenderloin into the basket of the preheated air fryer and cook, undisturbed, until slightly pink in the center, about 20 minutes. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the center should read at least 63°C (63 degrees C). Transfer to a cutting board and let rest for 10 minutes.
Meanwhile, place green beans and potatoes into the air fryer basket and cook for 10 minutes, shaking halfway through cook time.
Slice tenderloin and serve with potatoes and green beans.

airfryer-garlic-bread-recipe-comedera.name: Airfryer Garlic Bread Recipe
airfryer-garlic-bread-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de pan de ajo en airfryer
instructions: Take the baguette-type bread and cut into pieces.
Peel garlic and steamstick teeth into fine pieces. Stretch the parsley's mantle.
It incorporates butter at temperature into a bowl, adds pint of salt and garlic powder.
Add steamed garlic and cut parsley, mix very well to form a well-created pasta.
It purifies the airfryer to 180 and 3.
One slice of bread with butter and garlic and other ingredients.
Hornea at 3 to 5 minutes of air frying until butter and dart are melting.
Withdraw from the airfryer, let them stand and ready.
Enjoy!

almond-kale-and-banana-smoothie.name: Almond, Kale, And Banana Smoothie

ingredients.item: Unsweetened almond milk or coconut water

instructions: Blend orange, dates, almonds, and 3 Tbsp. water in a blender on low speed until almonds are finely ground.
Increase speed to high and blend until mixture is no longer grainy, about 1 minute.
Add banana, kale, almond milk, and ½ cup ice; blend until drink is smooth and thick.

and-delicious-chocolate-volcano-comedera.name: And Delicious Chocolate Volcano
and-delicious-chocolate-volcano-comedera.original_name: Volcán de chocolate fácil y delicioso

ingredients.item: Ice cream at your best to come with

instructions: Prepara todos los ingredientes, y empieza a armar este delicioso postre.
In a deep bathroom bin I would add the chocolate and butter.
Remove the contents with a spatula until completely melting and the ingredients are integrated. Reserve.
In another bowl, add the eggs with the sugar and beat up until the sugar has been dissolved and the mixture is sparkling and light.
Once the chocolate is warm and the egg mixture is ready, add slowly while bounding, chocolate and vanilla essence to the mixture until the ingredients are integrated.
Add the steamed flour to the mixture while at the same time pounding, it will be ready till it's a homogenous mixture and does not contain clumps.
Fold up butter and add cocoa powder to avoid gluing. Swallow the mixture into the mold to cover them a little more than half and put the freezer up for 2 hours.

and-fluffy-american-pancakes-pequereceta.name: And Fluffy American Pancakes

ingredients.item: 30 g de mantequilla pomada o a temperatura ambiente

instructions: We put our eggs, butter, sugar, salt, milk and we beat everything.
Incorporamos la harina junto con la levadura y batimos todo de nuevo. Dejamos que la mezcla repose unos 20 minutos.
On an anti-stick plate or frying pan with a slice of butter we grease the surface.
To make it more comfortable we will put the mixture into a pitcher and put some of the mixture into the frying pan, about two tablespoons.
We wait till the whole surface's filled with bubbles, so with a tongue or spatula we turn them around
Dejamos que se dore por el otro lado, unos segundos y sacamos.
We have repeated our operation till our mix's complete. Let's put our pancakes on one plate and cover them with paper.

andalusian-stew-recipe-step-by-step-come.name: Andalusian Stew Recipe Step By Step
andalusian-stew-recipe-step-by-step-come.original_name: Receta de puchero andaluz paso a paso
instructions: Antes de iniciar la receta, es importante que dejes remojando en abundante agua los garbanzos para que se vayan ablandado y puedas quitarle con facilidad las impurezas.
Debes retirarle la capa que desprenden y escurrir muy bien.
Also, 1 hour before cooking, soak with water the salt shin to remove some excess salt.
Una vez tengas a la mano todos los ingredientes, manos a la obra.
Coloca en una olla grande los garbanzos con 1 litro de agua. Tapa y cocina a fuego normal hasta que hiervan.
Mientras, toma las patatas, pela y corta en cubos. Haz lo propio con la zanahoria, pero corta en rodajas. Trocea las ramas de apio y reserva.
When the chickenpods are boiling, it incorporates the pinzo, bone and rib. Cooking for 10 minutes.
Later, add beef and let cook for 15 minutes more with other ingredients. If the stock has been reduced, add more water. The idea is that everything will be cooked in abundant fluids.
Test the stock and if you lack salt, add some pepper to your taste. I mean, you have to be trying, as the shattering from if it's gonna have a taste.
When you have been up to 15 minutes, add the vegetables, the bacon and the same as chicken without skin. Add some more water, lower fire and cook for 30 minutes.
Destapa la olla y retira las hortalizas que deben estar blandas. Reserva.
Keep cooking and chewing till they're soft. Remember that if the broth is reduced you have to be added to suit the cooking. It's also important to rectify salt.
When the meat are soft, go and put them back into a plate. Do the same with the chickpeas. It's all to stay separate, but only the stock should be put in the pot.
Apaga y deja reposar un rato.
Para servir, toma las carnes y deshebra un poco y retira los huesos. Corta en cubos o tiras el tocino.
Sirve en un plato, las carnes desherbadas, el tocino, un poco de garbanzos y hortalizas. Sirve al caldo aparte y listo, es hora de degustar el puchero.

apple-and-coconut-milk-cupcakes.name: Apple And Coconut Milk Cupcakes
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease 10 cups of a muffin tin or line with paper muffin liners.
Combine all-purpose flour, sugar, coconut flour, baking powder, cinnamon, salt, and nutmeg together in a bowl.
Whisk egg lightly in a large bowl. Add applesauce, coconut milk, vegetable oil, honey, and vanilla extract. Stir in flour mixture until batter is just combined. Scoop into the prepared muffin pan.
Bake in the preheated oven until tops spring back when lightly pressed and a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean, about 30 minutes.

apple-baked-beans.name: Apple Baked Beans
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Stir pork and beans, bacon, apples, barbeque sauce, brown sugar, and raisins together in a 9x13-inch baking dish.
Bake in preheated oven for 90 minutes.

apple-lattice-tart-lezzet.name: Apple Lattice Tart

ingredients.item: Half water glass coarse broken walnut

instructions: 1. Take softened butter, eggs, yogurt, olive oil and powder sugar in the room heat into the dough kneading container.
2. Extract and add baking powder and vanilla.
3. knead until it gets a soft consistency dough.
4. From the dough, walnut size parts are delivered in the form of a thin layer into small weighing molds that you lubricate.
5. Wait for the remaining dough in the refrigerator.
6. For the inner mortar, peel the shells of apples and cook it by adding sugar with cinnamon.
7. Add boiled walnuts and cook for 2-3 minutes.
8. Leave it from January and cool.
9. Share the cold inner mortar on the dough inside the small weighing molds.
10. Prepare the rods by moving parts from the dough that you are hungry.
11. 11. Place the rods in the form of cage on the apple mortar.
12. Pre-heated 175 degree bake 25-30 minutes.
12. August Serve your service.
14.  Afiyet olsun.
15. If you wish, try Apple cookie recipe.

apple-slaw-with-pineapple.name: Apple Slaw With Pineapple
instructions: Whisk cream, mayonnaise, and sugar in a large salad bowl until sugar has dissolved. Gently fold in cabbage, apple, and pineapple to coat with dressing. Refrigerate until serving time.

apple-chai-spiced-bread-pudding.name: Apple-chai Spiced Bread Pudding
instructions: Preheat the oven to 163°C (165 degrees C). Spray an 8-inch square baking dish with nonstick cooking spray. Place cubed bread inside of dish and set aside.

Bring milk, cardamom pods, allspice berries, cinnamon, and nutmeg to a simmer in a saucepan over medium-low heat; simmer for about 5 minutes. Remove from heat and let cool for 15 minutes. Strain milk into a bowl to remove large spices.

Heat 4 tablespoons butter in a saute pan over medium-high heat. Saute apple in the hot butter until tender, about 5 minutes. Turn off heat and add 1 cup brown sugar, vanilla extract, and caramel extract. Stir until sugar is melted. Pour over bread cubes and toss until evenly distributed.

Beat eggs and cooled, spiced milk together in a mixing bowl using an electric mixer. Pour over the bread mixture. Allow bread to soak up mixture, 10 to 15 minutes, lightly tapping down bread cubes as needed so egg mixture can soak in.
Sprinkle remaining 1/4 cup brown sugar over the bread pudding. Melt remaining butter in a microwave-safe dish in a microwave, 15 to 30 seconds. Drizzle over brown sugar.
Bake in the preheated oven until set and a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean, 45 to 60 minutes. Serve warm or cold.

apricot-cake-argiro.name: Apricot Cake
instructions: In a saucepan, add the sugar and water.
Mix until the ingredients are built (after building, do not mix again).
Allow the caramel to boil over medium heat and get bland. We're pulling her out of the fire.
Butter a refractive vehicle of 30×20 cm, make non-stick paper and empty the blonde caramel inside.
Shake the baking pan so that the caramel goes everywhere while it is warm and fluid because as soon as it gets cold it thinks.
As soon as it gets cold, it'll be like a glass.

arancini-italian-rice-balls-epicurious.name: Arancini (italian Rice Balls) | Epicurious
instructions: Combine the rice and broth in a large pot. Bring to a boil and then reduce to a simmer, cover, and cook until the water is absorbed and the rice is soft and creamy, about 15 to 20 minutes. Stir occasionally to ensure the rice doesn’t stick to the bottom of the pot.
While the rice is cooking, heat the butter and olive oil in a small pan over medium heat and add the prosciutto. Cook until it begins to crisp, about 2 minutes. Set aside.
Once the rice is cooked, remove to a large baking sheet and let cool for 10 minutes. (Rice can be made a day ahead, cooled, and stored in the refrigerator overnight.)
While the rice is cooling, pour 1/2 cup (120 ml) room-temperature water into a shallow bowl. Place the bread crumbs in a separate shallow bowl. Set both aside.
Once the rice is cool, combine it with the crisped prosciutto, egg, parsley, Parmigiano cheese, and salt in a large bowl.

Using an ice cream scoop or lightly wet hands, create a 2-inch (5-cm) round ball with the rice mixture. Make an indentation in the middle and add a cube of mozzarella cheese. Encase the cheese with rice and reshape into a perfect ball, then set on the baking sheet. Repeat with the remaining rice mixture.
Using your hands, lightly wet the outside of each of the rice balls with the room-temperature water, then roll in the bread crumbs. Set them on the baking sheet.

Heat the vegetable oil in a large pot to 177°C (175°C). Drop 4 rice balls into the oil (they should fully submerge) and cook until the outside is golden brown, about 3 minutes. If your pot is wide, carefully roll the rice balls in the oil to ensure even cooking on all sides.
Transfer to paper towels to drain. Repeat with the remaining rice balls. They are best eaten at room temperature, garnished with a sprinkling of grated Parmesan cheese, if you can wait!

arugula-and-goat-cheese-pizza.name: Arugula And Goat Cheese Pizza
instructions: Preheat the oven according to pizza package instructions.

Dab pesto onto the center of the pizza base, and spread toward the outer edges. Cut the goat cheese into thin coins, and spread or crumble across the pizza. Arrange tomato slices over goat cheese. Sprinkle with garlic. Brush the crust edges lightly with olive oil.
Place pizza directly on preheated oven rack. Bake for 5 to 10 minutes, or until the crust edges are golden.

After taking pizza out of the oven, allow to cool for a few minutes so that the cheese has time to set. After a couple of minutes, cover the pizza with a few handfuls of arugula. Cut, serve, and enjoy!

asia-minor-boran-with-minced-meat-argiro.name: Asia Minor Boran With Minced Meat
instructions: Fine chop the meat into minced meat with 2 knives. The ‘kind’ meat, lamb or calf, looks like coat minced meat. Add the olive oil to the chopped meat and set aside for a while. Clean the grasses, Wash them and drag them well. Cut them into nick pieces Wash the rice and drag. We sprinkle it with a lemon juice. In a wide pot, add the butter melt. Add the finely chopped meat and let it brown for 4-5’, in a strong heat. Add the chopped dried onions. Sauté until the onion is clear for 4-5’. Add the greens and mix to drop their volume and wither for 3-4’. Add the tomato, rice and 1/2 cup of boating water. Add some salt and some pepper. Cover the pot and let it cook for 15’ over low heat. Turn off and let it stand for 5’. Serve the burran on a platter and pour with the yogurt sauce. Sprinkle with some red pepper.

asian-pear-salad-with-crispy-shallots.name: Asian Pear Salad With Crispy Shallots

ingredients.item: (packed) cilantro leaves with tender stems and mint leaves

instructions: Heat ⅓ cup vegetable oil in a small saucepan over medium-high. Cook 2 large shallots, thinly sliced, stirring occasionally, until golden brown and crisp, 7–9 minutes. Pour through a fine-mesh sieve set over a small bowl. Remove sieve from bowl and sprinkle shallots with a big pinch of kosher salt; toss to coat. Set fried shallots aside. Let oil cool slightly, then measure out ¼ cup shallot oil.

Whisk ¼ cup white wine vinegar, 2 Tbsp. Dijon mustard, and 1 Tbsp. honey in a large bowl to combine. Gradually stream in ¼ cup shallot oil, whisking constantly until emulsified. Season dressing with salt and freshly ground pepper.

Add 4 Asian pears, cored, cut into 3x½" sticks, to dressing and toss to coat. Add 1 Fresno chile, very thinly sliced, 1 cup (packed) cilantro leaves with tender stems and mint leaves, and most of reserved fried shallots and toss to combine. Top salad with more cilantro and mint and remaining fried shallots.

avocado-lime-sauce-vierge.name: Avocado-lime Sauce Vierge

ingredients.item: Fine sea salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions:
Combine oil, avocado, jalapeño, garlic, and shallot in a medium bowl. Squeeze limes into avocado mixture. Using a spoon, scrape pulp out of limes into mixture. Stir to combine.
Do ahead: Sauce can be made 4 days ahead. Press a piece of plastic wrap directly onto surface of sauce. Cover and chill. Bring sauce to room temperature before continuing.
Stir basil and cilantro into sauce just before serving. Season with salt and pepper.

awesome-sweet-potato-casserole.name: Awesome Sweet Potato Casserole
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease a 9x13-inch baking dish.

Beat sweet potatoes, white sugar, pineapple, coconut, 1/2 cup melted butter, milk, eggs, and vanilla extract together in a large bowl until smooth; pour into the prepared pan and set aside. Combine brown sugar, pecans, flour, and 1/3 cup melted butter in a separate bowl; sprinkle over sweet potato mixture.
Bake in the preheated oven until casserole is bubbly and topping is browned, about 30 minutes.
